data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The requirement for validation rules (regex, min/max, required) is not fully satisfied as the evidence only confirms five out of the eight required field types: text, number, boolean, and dropdown. Specifically, there is no evidence for the required field types of date, multi-select, URL, and color picker, which constitutes a clear gap in the requirement coverage. This is supported by the prior step evidence that explicitly states the missing field types, leading to the conclusion that the requirement is not fully satisfied.
gaps: Missing evidence for field types: date, multi-select, URL, color picker.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
